AccountPage.title: Account Settings
AccountPage.moreSettingsLater: Password, language, privacy and notification settings will be added here later.

Home.title: Welcome to TTRPG Hub
Home.description: Your campaigns, characters, and gaming tools in one place.

Dashboard.title: My Dashboard
Dashboard.noCampaigns: You do not have any campaigns yet.
Dashboard.noCharacters: You do not have any characters yet.
Dashboard.campaignsDescription: View campaigns you lead or have joined.
Dashboard.charactersDescription: Create and manage your tabletop role-playing characters.

Register.title: Create account
Register.success: If registration is possible, we sent a confirmation email. If you already have an account, log in or reset your password.

Characters.title: My Characters
Characters.loadError: The characters could not be loaded. Please try again.
Characters.empty: You do not have any characters yet.
Characters.emptyDescription: Create your first character to start building their story.

CharacterSystemSelection.title: Choose a Game System
CharacterSystemSelection.description: Select the game system for your new character.

CharacterDetails.unavailableDescription: This character does not exist or you do not have access to it.

vtmV5.description: A game of personal horror, political intrigue, and struggling with the Beast.

callOfCthulhu7e.description: An investigative horror game about mysteries, dangerous knowledge, and the Cthulhu Mythos.

CharacterForm.visibilityOwnerOnlyHelp: Character access is currently private. Only you can view this character.
CharacterForm.visibilityInactiveHelp: This saved visibility value does not currently share the character. Only you can view it. You can keep it or change it to Private.
CharacterForm.visibilityCampaignHelp: Campaign members can view this character only while it is linked to one of your active campaigns.
CharacterForm.visibilityReadOnlyHelp: Only the character owner can change visibility.

CharacterEditor.clearConfirm: Clear all character fields? The changes will not be saved until you select Save Changes.
CharacterEditor.clearNotice: The form has been cleared. Select Save Changes to save the empty values.
CharacterEditor.unsupported: A character sheet for this game is not available yet.
CharacterEditor.readOnlyNotice: You are viewing a shared campaign character. Only the owner can edit this sheet.

UnsavedChanges.portraitStatus: Portrait changes are not stored in the browser draft and will be lost if you leave before saving.
UnsavedChanges.leaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page without saving them?

CharacterDelete.confirm: Delete character "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

ShortDescription.label: Short Description
ShortDescription.placeholder: A short description shown on the character card.
ShortDescription.counter: {count}/{maximum} characters. Maximum {lines} lines, {perLine} characters per line.

GamesPage.title: Games
GamesPage.vampireDescription: Personal horror, political intrigue, and the struggle to retain humanity.

VampireGamePage.description: A tabletop role-playing game about vampires, personal horror, political intrigue, and the struggle to retain humanity.

NotFoundPage.title: Page not found
NotFoundPage.description: The page you requested does not exist or may have been moved.

Metadata.title: TTRPG Hub
Metadata.description: Campaigns, characters, and tools for tabletop role-playing games.

AuthErrors.invalidCredentials: The email address or password is incorrect.
AuthErrors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address before logging in.
AuthErrors.emailAddressInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
AuthErrors.weakPassword: The password does not meet the security requirements.
AuthErrors.signupDisabled: New account registration is currently unavailable.
AuthErrors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a little and try again.
AuthErrors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Campaigns.title: My Campaigns
Campaigns.description: Campaigns you lead as Game Master or have joined as a Player.
Campaigns.loadError: The campaigns could not be loaded. Please try again.
Campaigns.emptyDescription: Create your first campaign or join one using an invitation link.

CampaignCreate.title: Create Campaign
CampaignCreate.intro: Set up the campaign basics. You will become its permanent Game Master.
CampaignCreate.name: Campaign name
CampaignCreate.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the premise, tone, or starting situation.

CampaignDetails.unavailableDescription: This campaign does not exist or you do not have access to it.
CampaignDetails.playersHelp: Players who currently belong to this campaign.
CampaignDetails.linkedCharactersHelp: Characters currently linked to this campaign.
CampaignDetails.nextDescription: Link compatible characters and manage campaign sharing here.
CampaignDetails.completedHelp: This campaign is completed and read-only. Existing participants remain visible, while invitations and membership changes are disabled.

CampaignInvitations.title: Invitations
CampaignInvitations.description: Create a one-time link for a Player. Each link expires after seven days and can be revoked before use.
CampaignInvitations.completedDescription: This campaign is completed. Existing invitation history is read-only.
CampaignInvitations.creatingStatus: Creating a campaign invitation. Please wait.
CampaignInvitations.createdStatus: Invitation created. Copy the link before leaving or reloading this page.
CampaignInvitations.latestDescription: This full link is shown only now. Save or copy it before leaving or reloading the page.
CampaignInvitations.copyError: Unable to copy the invitation link.
CampaignInvitations.empty: No invitations have been created yet.
CampaignInvitations.linkUnavailable: The full link is no longer available. Revoke this invitation and create another one if a new link is needed.
CampaignInvitations.revokeConfirm: Revoke this invitation? Its link will stop working immediately.

CampaignMembers.title: Members
CampaignMembers.description: The Game Master is permanent. Players can leave an active campaign, and the Game Master can remove Players.
CampaignMembers.noPlayers: No Players have joined this campaign yet.
CampaignMembers.removeConfirm: Remove {name} from this campaign? Their active character links will also be closed.
CampaignMembers.leaveConfirm: Leave this campaign? Your active character links to it will also be closed.
CampaignMembers.completedHelp: Membership changes are disabled because the campaign is completed.
CampaignMembers.loadError: Unable to load the Player list.

CampaignJoin.title: Join campaign
CampaignJoin.description: Accepting this invitation adds you to the campaign as a Player.
CampaignJoin.securityNote: Accept only invitation links received from someone you trust. A link can be used once and may already be expired or revoked.
CampaignJoin.joinError: This invitation is invalid, expired, revoked, already used, or unavailable to your account.

CampaignCharacters.title: Campaign characters
CampaignCharacters.description: Link one of your compatible characters to share it with the campaign. Linked sheets are read-only for other participants.
CampaignCharacters.completedDescription: This campaign is completed. Existing linked characters remain available to participants, but linking and unlinking are disabled.
CampaignCharacters.linkedEmpty: No characters are currently linked to this campaign.
CampaignCharacters.unlinkConfirm: Unlink {name} from this campaign? The character will not be deleted.
CampaignCharacters.yourCharactersDescription: A character must use this campaign's game system, have Campaign visibility, and not be linked to another campaign.
CampaignCharacters.availableEmpty: You have no other compatible characters available for this campaign.
CampaignCharacters.needsCampaignVisibility: Change visibility to Campaign before linking
CampaignCharacters.linkError: Unable to link the character. Check its visibility and existing campaign links.

CampaignCharacterDetails.unavailableDescription: This character is not actively linked to this campaign or you do not have access to it.
